source.title: Biblical Principles for Follow-Up Conversations
source.summary: Healthy follow-up: (1) Respect their space—let them initiate if they showed reluctance; (2) Keep it natural—weave faith into ordinary life rather than forcing 'gospel appointments'; (3) Be consistent in friendship regardless of their spiritual response; (4) Offer resources without demanding they read/watch them; (5) Ask permission before diving back into deep topics; (6) Pray more than you talk; (7) Remember conversion is God's work, not yours. Pressure tactics often harm both the relationship and the gospel witness. Trust the Holy Spirit's timing while remaining available and faithful.
